overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along wet streets reflecting vibrant pink, blue, and purple neon signs, encounters pedestrians and monks, and transitions from open streets to elevated walkways and covered plazas.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past brightly lit storefronts and digital billboards

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying 'EL GUAPO' advertisement with neon purple and white text
building edge lined with bright pink neon tube lights reflecting on wet pavement
tall vertical neon sign with Japanese characters and 'TENGU' text in purple

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera walking forward along the sidewalk. Bright pink neon lights line the building facade on the left, while the 'EL GUAPO' digital billboard glows prominently. The 'TENGU' hotel sign rises in the distance, and sparse traffic moves along the street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with religious figures and large advertisements

events.description: turns left at street corner, changing direction from straight to leftward path
encounters three monks in brown robes standing stationary near a large billboard

agents.ego_description: turning left at the street corner and approaching a group of monks standing near the gorilla billboard

notable_agents.action: three monks in brown robes standing still with hands clasped in prayer or meditation

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying a gorilla face with text 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH'
tall cylindrical structure with multiple digital screens rotating around it
metal railing marking the edge of an elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at a street corner, leaving the pink neon storefronts behind. A group of three monks in brown robes stands prominently near a massive billboard featuring a gorilla face with 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH' text. The scene opens into a wider plaza area with a cylindrical rotating billboard structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking city plaza

events.description: transitions from street level to elevated walkway with panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway with expansive views of the futuristic city skyline and skyscrapers

entered.detail: dense cluster of towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents filling the skyline
distinctive curved building with blue neon lighting and circular architectural elements
open plaza area visible below the elevated walkway with small trees and street lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving along an elevated walkway, the camera reveals a breathtaking view of the futuristic city skyline with dense clusters of illuminated skyscrapers. A distinctive blue curved building stands out on the right, while the street-level plaza with small trees lies below. The wet surfaces continue to reflect the myriad neon lights from the surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with purple neon ceiling lighting

events.description: enters covered plaza area with purple neon ceiling lights and enclosed architecture

agents.ego_description: entering a covered plaza with purple neon lighting and walking past benches and scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: overhead concrete ceiling structure covering the pedestrian plaza
continuous strips of purple and cyan neon lights running along the ceiling edges
simple concrete seating benches arranged along the walkway
large digital screens displaying animated advertisements on the plaza walls

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian plaza sheltered from the open sky, illuminated by vibrant purple and cyan neon strips along the ceiling. Concrete benches line the walkway, and digital advertising screens glow on the walls. The space feels more enclosed and intimate compared to the open elevated walkway, with scattered pedestrians moving through the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, neon-drenched street into a wide, open urban plaza. It begins by walking along a wet sidewalk where bright pink neon lights and the glowing EL GUAPO billboard reflect off the pavement, while the TENGU hotel sign looms in the distance. As the camera reaches a street corner, it turns left, leaving the vibrant storefronts behind and shifting the focus toward a group of monks in brown robes. The scene then expands into a broader plaza, passing a massive billboard of a gorilla face with the text WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH before finally revealing a cylindrical rotating billboard structure in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive elevated vista of a futuristic skyline into the enclosed intimacy of a neon-lit pedestrian plaza. It begins by gliding along an open walkway, revealing a dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and a distinctive blue curved building overlooking a wet, reflective plaza below. As the camera moves forward, the wide urban horizon recedes and the environment shifts inward, transitioning from the open air into a sheltered covered space. The scene then narrows as vibrant purple and cyan neon strips replace the city lights, guiding the view past concrete benches and glowing digital advertisements. Finally, the perspective settles within this intimate corridor, moving among scattered pedestrians beneath the artificial glow of the ceiling.
